titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Luis Alberto Guajardo Papers on the History of Coahuila
Guajardo (Luis Alberto) Papers on the History of Coahuila
titlestmt.author: by Alison Clemens

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 3196284.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday February 13, 2021 at 04:00

did.unittitle: Luis Alberto Guajardo Papers on the History of Coahuila

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: Typescripts, notes, and typewritten transcriptions of original source material concerning the development of Luis Alberto Guajardo's Apuntes, Datos, y Noticias Para la Historia de Coahuila. Topics documented include the history of Coahuila and Mexico, particularly Monclova; the history of the presidio of Santa Rosa, including its mines; the history of indigenous people in the region; the military feats of Juan de Ugalde; the wars of independence of 1810 and 1821; the cholera epidemics of 1833 and 1849; the campaign into Texas in 1836; and the Mexican Revolution of 1910 and 1911.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The original order in which this collection was arranged has been maintained.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Luis Alberto Guajardo Papers on the History of Coahuila is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Luis Alberto Guajardo Papers on the History of Coahuila. Yale Collection of Western Americana, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Luis Alberto Guajardo (1872-1925) was a general in the Mexican Army. He was born in Músquiz, Coahuila and participated in the Mexican Revolution. His military travels allowed him to visit local record offices in Coahuila and research the history of the region, as well as make copies of original documents. This research led to the formulation of Apuntes Datos y Noticias Para la Historia de Coahuila, a history of the Coahuila region.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Typescripts, notes, and typewritten transcriptions of original source material concerning the development of Luis Alberto Guajardo's Apuntes, Datos, y Noticias Para la Historia de Coahuila. Topics documented include the history of Coahuila and Mexico, particularly Monclova; the history of the presidio of Santa Rosa, including its mines; the history of indigenous people in the region; the military feats of Juan de Ugalde; the wars of independence of 1810 and 1821; the cholera epidemics of 1833 and 1849; the campaign into Texas in 1836; and the Mexican Revolution of 1910 and 1911.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing in 2014, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are taken from Luis Alberto Guajardo's folder titles wherever possible. Titles appearing in Spanish have been taken from Guajardo's folder titles; tiles appearing in English were supplied by staff during initial processing. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: Associated material: Luis Alberto Guajardo Collection of Músquiz, Mexico Records (WA MSS S-1482). Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

did.unittitle: Tables of content and duplicate notes

Denuncios de Minas en el Cerro del Mercado, 1690
Varios Documentos Antiguos, 1763-1785

Real Presidio de Rio Grande, 1782-1787
Real Presidio de Rio Grande y El Capitan Don Juan de Ugalde, 1778-1788
Juicio de Residencia de Nicolás Guaxardo, 1700 (copy 1 of 3)
Juicio de Residencia de Nicolás Guaxardo, 1700 (copy 2 of 3)
Juicio de Residencia de Nicolás Guaxardo, 1700 (copy 3 of 3)
Transcriptions related to Nicolás Guaxardo
Assorted drafts from the Apuntes
Mandamiento de Duque de Albuquerque, 1658
Visita Oficial de Governador Tueros, 1785
Disputa entre el Virrey Don Manuel Flores y El Cabaliero de Castro, 1791
Unedited notes on 1800-1810
Estado de la España Hasta Fines de 1809 y Varios Oficios Superiores: Génesis de la Insurrección, 1801-1811
Comunicaciones y Decretos de los años de 1812-1821
Prision de los Primeros Heroes Insurgentes de 1810 y Su Caida en Bajan, Coahuila: Apuntes de Fray Gregorio de la Concepcion, 1810-1811
Apuntes para la Historia de la Revolucion del Año de 1810: Escrito por un Compañero del Señor Hidalgo
Génesis de la Insurrección, 1810-1811
Estado de España en 1810 y Génesis de la Insurrección, 1810
Assorted notes on the insurrection, 1810-1811
Typed transcripts of decrees of 1812-1818
Manuscript copies of correspondence from local offices, 1804-1835
Data and decrees on regions in Coahuila, 1819-1836
Notes on the years 1821-1822
Iturbide, 1822-1823
Chronology for 1821-1832
Actos de Ayuntamiento del Presidio de Santa Rosa, 1821-1836
Datos históricos, tomados directamente de sus originales, 1821-1835
Proyecto Canal Tehuantepec, 1824-1826
Notes on Coahuila y Texas, 1823-1825
Datos históricos, tomados directamente de sus originales, 1824-1826
Notes on 1827-1829
Notes on 1828-1829
Notes on 1829-1830
Copies of notes for the Apuntes, 1831-1839
Copies of notes for the Apuntes, 1832-1833
Notes for the Apuntes, 1833-1849
Invasión del Cólera Chico en la República, 1833 y la Campaña de Texas
De Mineria - Coahuila
Comunicaciones y Decretos, 1831-1832
Bocetos del Desierto: Novela Histórica por L. Alberto Guajardo
Comunicaciones y Decretos de Santa Rosa, 1833-1835
Notes and statistical information for Coahuila, including Seminoles, Organización de Texas, Monclova
Copies of notes on the Campaña de Texas, 1836
Notes on campaigns in Texas and against the Indians, including the Comanches, Lipanes, and Mezcaleros, 1837-1845
La Indiada Grande, 1839
Statistical information for Monclova and other parts of the Rio Grande, 1841-1842
Cuarta Epoca de Apuntes y Noticias Para la Historia de Coahuila, 1850-1873
Acusación politica, firmada por sus autores y presentada ante D. Ramón Corral, Vice-Presidente de la República, 1904
Revolucion de 1910, Apuntes de L. Alberto Guajardo
Notes on 1842-1847
El Asalto a la Indiada Grande en el Pozo y El Ataque a la Hacienda de la Mota en 1848
Cholera in Santa Rosa Maria del Sacramento, 1849
Una Campaña al Norte de Coahuila: La Batalla de la Rosita
Informe de la Comision Pesquisidora de la Frontera del Norte al Ejecutivo de la Union, 1873 (2 copies)
Costumbres Indios para la Historia de Coahuila
Visita a las Minas de Santa Rosa, 1785
Miscelánea Histórica
La Tribu Quickapoó: Antecedentes y Vocabulario del Idioma Quickapoó y Su Equivalencia en Español
Noticia sobre el Padre Vetancurt
Miscelánea Histórica
Correspondencia con el Dr. Francisco Vásquez Gomez

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes two letters to J. Frank Dobie at University of Texas

did.unittitle: Presidio de la Babia y Otros Fuertes, 1774 drafts and duplicates
Creacion del Presidio de Santa Rosa, 1736
Actas del Ayuntamiento de Santa Rosa de 1821 hasta 1834
Notes on the history of Santa Rosa
De Mineria en el Presidio de Santa Rosa

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes two manuscript petitions to the Diputacion de Mineria de Santa Rosa from the towns of Monclova and Cienega, 1845, 1896

did.unittitle: Al Derredor de la Lumbre: Las Casas Consistoriales de Santa Rosa
Notes on the history Monclova
Noticias sobre el Agua del Rio de Monclova
Notes on Monclova: Cuarto Cuaderno
Copias de Algunos Documentos Pertenecientes a los Pueblos de San Francisco y San Miguel, Anexos a la Ciudad de Monclova, 1907
Historia de Monclova, 1810-1811: Los Insurgentes de la Primera Epoca de la Independencia Mexicana
Historia de Monclova: Real Provision de Don Pedro Sebreán, 1744
